response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development, particularly in full-stack and tooling roles, but his background lacks direct alignment with the core requirements of a Principal Performance Architect focused on AI accelerators, SoC/IP modeling, and hardware-software co-design. His expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and performance optimization is tangential, and his work history does not demonstrate deep involvement in hardware optimization or GPU/accelerator architecture.
strengths: Strong full-stack and tooling development experience, including contributions to AI-agent infrastructure.
Diverse technical background with exposure to multiple languages (DLang, TypeScript, C/C++) and performance-sensitive applications (e.g., low-latency services at Sociomantic).
Proven ability to lead open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and mentor others, indicating leadership and collaboration skills.
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture, or deep-learning workload optimization for AI accelerators.
Lacks the required educational background (no advanced degree in CS/engineering) or equivalent professional experience in hardware performance architecture.
Work history is heavily skewed toward web/mobile/desktop development, with limited exposure to cloud infrastructure or hardware optimization.
